title: Private Limited Company Registration in Mumbai | Virtual Auditor
description: Register a Private Limited Company in Mumbai with Virtual Auditor. Expert CA-assisted incorporation via SPICe+. Same-week delivery. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for Private Limited Company registration in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides end-to-end Pvt Ltd incorporation services in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). From name approval through Certificate of Incorporation, we handle every step.

What is Private Limited Company Registration?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Certificate of Incorporation from the Registrar of Companies (ROC Mumbai). PAN and TAN allotment (simultaneous through SPICe+). Customised Memorandum of Association (MOA) and Articles of Association (AOA) drafted to your specifications. Digital copies of all filed forms (SPICe+ INC-32, INC-33, INC-34) with MCA acknowledgment. GST registration applied simultaneously where required. Professional tax registration for Maharashtra. Post-incorporation compliance checklist with due dates for statutory filings, board meetings, and annual returns.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Company Registration in Mumbai
  Virtual Auditor combines chartered accountancy with company secretarial expertise under one roof. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) handles both financial and corporate governance compliance, eliminating the common gap between your CA and CS. Our Mumbai office at Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West ensures local ROC coordination and in-person consultations. We have incorporated 100+ companies across entity types — Pvt Ltd, OPC, LLP, Section 8, and Nidhi companies. Every incorporation includes customised MOA/AOA, not templated documents. We set up your complete post-incorporation compliance from day one: statutory registers, first board meeting minutes, share certificates, and an annual compliance calendar.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Free consultation to understand your business structure, shareholder pattern, and capital requirements. Step 2: DSC procurement for all directors and DIN application (if not already held). Step 3: Name reservation through RUN (Reserve Unique Name) or Part B of SPICe+. Step 4: Drafting of MOA and AOA customised to your business objects and shareholder agreement terms. Step 5: SPICe+ (INC-32) filing with MCA for incorporation, PAN, TAN, and GST registration simultaneously. Step 6: Certificate of Incorporation received — typically within 5-7 working days of filing. Step 7: Post-incorporation setup: statutory registers, first board resolution, share certificate issuance, and compliance calendar.
  HEADING2: Mumbai-Specific Advantages
  Mumbai companies are registered under ROC Mumbai jurisdiction. Our physical presence in Goregaon West enables quick coordination with ROC Mumbai for any queries or hearings. We also handle Maharashtra-specific requirements — Professional Tax registration (mandatory for companies in Maharashtra), Shops and Establishment Act registration, and PTRC/PTEC enrollment. For startups, we assist with DPIIT Startup India recognition immediately post-incorporation, unlocking tax benefits under Section 80-IAC and angel tax exemption under Section 56(2)(viib).
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Ready to incorporate your Private Limited Company in Mumbai? Contact Virtual Auditor for a free consultation:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Fixed-fee pricing with no hidden charges. Certificate of Incorporation typically delivered within 5-7 working days.

faqs.q: How long does Private Limited Company registration take in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Typically 5-7 working days from filing of SPICe+ form with MCA. Name reservation takes 1-2 days additionally. Total timeline from engagement to Certificate of Incorporation: 7-10 working days.

faqs.q: What is the cost of Pvt Ltd registration in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Our all-inclusive fee covers DSC, DIN, name reservation, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA drafting, and government fees. Contact us at +91-77000 89597 for a fixed-fee quote. No hidden charges.

faqs.q: Do I need to visit your Mumbai office for company registration?
faqs.a: No. The entire process is handled digitally — DSC procurement, MCA filing, and document delivery. However, our Goregaon West office is available for in-person consultations if you prefer.
